content:
Hello everyone ,
I am working on some APIs that belong to the <net/netlink.h> { Defined a file named netlink.rs under src/linux/rust/kernel where I have defined my APIs and then added pub mod netlink.rs in lib.rs (same directory) } and I was meaning to test them but couldn't figure out how to proceed as how to do that , should i just write a module to test them and even so how can I do that after loading qemu ?
Any help is highly appreciated ! Thank you
You can write doc test for your API, if it doesn't require hardware to run your tests. With kunit, you can run it easily: https://docs.kernel.org/rust/testing.html#usage

Boqun Feng [said](https://rust-for-linux.zulipchat.com/#narrow/stream/291565-Help/topics.kernel.org/rust/testing.html#usage

Thank you!
